items.title: EIP-7594: PeerDAS - Peer Data Availability Sampling
items.description: Introducing simple DAS utilizing gossip distribution and peer requests. Extends EIP-4844 blobs using 1D erasure coding, column-based sampling, and introduces a 6-blob-per-transaction limit.

items.title: EIP-7823: Set Upper Bounds for MODEXP
items.description: Restricts each MODEXP precompile input field to a maximum of 8192 bits (1024 bytes) to reduce consensus bugs and simplify future EVMMAX replacement.
